caption: In a soccer stadium with red seating, several workers are seen moving a large, light-colored tarp across the green pitch. Two men are dressed in blue shirts and dark shorts, while another man wears a white t-shirt, a grey vest, and dark pants. In the initial scenes, the men hold and pull the tarp toward the right side of the field, moving past a white goalpost. The background features red stadium stands and advertising boards. Legible text on the boards includes "SERVICIOS DE TRANSPORTE" and "SERVICIOS DE TRANS," while a red banner in the stands contains Chinese characters and the phrase "欢迎你." The Real Madrid crest is visible in the top right corner of the frames. As the sequence progresses, the men continue dragging the fabric, shifting their positions and pulling it further across the grass toward the right edge of the frame.
